item.title: Kubernetes API Groups
item.author: Author
item.description: URL Scheme Version Version curl https://kube-master:6443/version API Version curl https://kube-master:6443/api/v1/pods Groups /metrics /metrics /healthz /healthz /version /version /api /api /apis /apis /logs /logs Core core The core (also called legacy) group is found at REST path /api/v1. The core group is not specified as part of the apiVersion field, for example, apiVersion: v1.
